_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Rogue; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)

name: Rogue
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Ambush
perks.effect: When exiting hide: +10% Move Speed Bonus and +25% Physical Power Bonus for 3s

perks.name: Back Attack
perks.effect: +30% Physical Power Bonus when attacking from behind (120°)

perks.name: Creep
perks.effect: Quieter footsteps while crouching; +10% Move Speed Bonus crouched; -50% monster detection radius

perks.name: Dagger Mastery
perks.effect: +10% Physical Power Bonus and +1 True Physical Damage with daggers

perks.name: Double Jump
perks.effect: Jump an additional time in the air

perks.name: Jokester
perks.effect: Self and party members within 6m gain +2 All Attributes

perks.name: Lethal Mark
perks.effect: Throwing knife hits inflict -15% Physical Damage Reduction for 8s

perks.name: Pickpocket
perks.effect: Steal items from a nearby enemy with the interact key

perks.name: Poisoned Weapon
perks.effect: Attacks apply poison: 4 Neutral Magical Base Damage over 4s

perks.name: Stealth
perks.effect: While hiding, move up to 10 steps crouched/slow-walking; +3 Move Speed Add per remaining step

perks.name: Traps and Locks
perks.effect: Unlock locks without a lockpick; detect traps within 4.5m and disarm them

perks.name: Veil of Shadows
perks.effect: Below 30% health: enter stealth for 6s (48s cooldown)

skills.name: Caltrops
skills.effect: Drops Caltrops at your feet that deal physical damage and slows the move speed bonus by of anything that steps on them for seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Cut Throat
skills.effect: When you successfully hit a target, silence them for seconds, disabling the targets skills spells performance abilities. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Dual Strike
skills.effect: Strike simultaneously with both daggers, delivering a powerful blow that combines the damage of both weapons. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Hide
skills.effect: Become invisible for seconds. It is possible to change your equipment in this state. You are revealed when you attempt an action, such as moving, attacking, or using a skill. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Rupture
skills.effect: The next successful attack causes the target to bleed for physical damage over seconds. The buff is consumed when an attack hits an object or target. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Shadowstep
skills.effect: While using a dagger or throwing knives, your next attack instantly moves you behind the target on hit. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Smoke Pot
skills.effect: A smoke pot is deployed creating a smoke screen. The smoke screen lasts seconds and covers a 6m area.When an enemy target enters the smoke screen, reduces their move speed bonus by.

skills.name: Sneak Attack
skills.effect: Your next melee attack deals an additional physical damage. If the target is not in combat, it deals an additional physical damage. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Tumbling
skills.effect: When used, backtumbles in the opposite direction the player is facing. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Weakpoint Attack
skills.effect: When you successfully hit a target, reduce their armor rating bonus by for seconds. Only when melee attacking. Cooldown: seconds
